sigma.title: HTTP Request With Empty User Agent

osquery.name: t1613_sys_info
osquery.query_text: SELECT hostname, cpu_type, physical_memory, hardware_vendor, hardware_model FROM system_info;

osquery.name: t1613_net_enum
osquery.query_text: SELECT interface, address, mask, type FROM interface_addresses WHERE interface != 'lo';

osquery_matches.name: t1613_sys_info
osquery_matches.query_text: SELECT hostname, cpu_type, physical_memory, hardware_vendor, hardware_model FROM system_info;

promotion.reason: S3 Silver (Linux Docker sandbox): 6 direct run(s) ran successfully, raw telemetry available, Sigma detection not confirmed (0/1 rules matched, 1 osquery).
